calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Hilary Newsom was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors, Talitha Thomas Callan and Siera Steven Zuleika Callan.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Talitha Thomas Newsom Callan and Siera Steven Zuleika Newsom Callan.

Decrees Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
